sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15879" key="a)rxeranisth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχερᾰν-ιστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n15879.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">president of an</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔρανος,</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.630.4</biblScope> </bibl> (<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχιερᾰνιστής</orth> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22.1369</biblScope></bibl>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.82</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
